meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no version control (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no version control. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Solve No Version Control
content.seo_description: Stop losing client work. Learn to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to master version control and ship professional-grade SaaS apps faster.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template solves the 'no version control' crisis by embedding automated Git initialization and structured branching into your initial scaffold. By pairing this with Claude Code, you enforce consistent commit hygiene and atomic deployments, ensuring every freelance project remains auditable, recoverable, and professional from the very first commit.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: 3 AM, a client is screaming for a hotfix, and you're staring at a folder of 'project_final_v2_realfinal' files with no history to revert to. The lack of version control isn't just a technical oversight; it is a ticking time bomb that destroys your reputation and your sanity.

But what if your development environment didn't just house code, but enforced professional standards? By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you transform your workflow from chaotic ad-hoc hacking into a disciplined, version-controlled architecture. It is time to stop losing progress and start building with the precision of a senior engineer.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation by cloning the Antigravity template, which includes pre-configured Git hooks and environment management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project with strict Git integration, including pre-commit hooks for linting and formatting.

steps.title: Automate Branching Strategy
steps.description: Define a clear flow for features and hotfixes to ensure your main branch remains deployable at all times.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the project environment to automatically enforce a feature-branching workflow using Git flow conventions.

steps.title: Configure Claude Code Context
steps.description: Map your project structure to Claude Code so the AI understands your versioning constraints before writing code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the directory structure and create a .claude-ignore file to keep the repository clean of temporary build artifacts.

steps.title: Implement Atomic Commits
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate meaningful commit messages based on specific task changes, preventing 'wip' commit pollution.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review current changes and generate a conventional commit message that describes the technical impact of this module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'git add . && git commit -m "feat: implement user auth service"'

steps.title: Verify Deployment Integrity
steps.description: Run a final validation check to ensure the project history is clean and ready for client handover.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the repository for missing documentation or uncommitted changes and provide a summary of the project health.

pro_tips: Always use a custom .gitattributes file to handle line endings consistently across Windows and macOS environments.
Utilize 'git stash' before switching contexts to protect uncommitted work, even when prototyping rapidly.
Integrate a CI/CD pipeline immediately after the first commit to automate tests, turning your repo into a living quality-assurance tool.
Use signed commits with GPG keys to provide clients with verified proof of your authorship and security standards.
Keep your 'main' branch protected with mandatory pull request reviews, even if you are working solo—it forces you to pause and self-review.
content.next_steps: Once your template is version-controlled, implement a staging environment using Vercel or Netlify to showcase your progress to clients in real-time.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting version control issues bottleneck your freelance career. Adopt the Antigravity workflow and ship with absolute confidence. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
